description: A designed dark-navy graphic titled 'ENFORCEMENT UPDATE' with the date 'January 29, 2025', topped by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal and name. It presents two large white figures: '1016 Arrests' and '814 Detainers Lodged'. A footnote reads 'ICE daily statistics as of midnight.' There is no photograph; it is a text-and-seal data card.
notable_text: ENFORCEMENT UPDATE January 29, 2025; 1016 Arrests; 814 Detainers Lodged; ICE daily statistics as of midnight.
